components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button for cart and checkout.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #111827; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-family: sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1f2937; }

components.name: Product Card
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card-img { height: 200px; background-color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-card-content { padding: 1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 500; margin: 0; } .ds-card-price { color: #64748b; margin-top: 0.25rem; }

narrative.overview: Svelte Commerce is designed for speed and clarity. The aesthetic is 'invisible UI'—a minimalist framework that exists solely to stage and sell products.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Vibrant Svelte Orange accent should appear on less than 5% of the total screen area.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: All elements sit on the same plane until interacted with.

dos: Do use generous whitespace (32px+) between major sections.
Do prioritize large, high-quality product imagery.
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't use neon gradients or 'glassmorphism' effects.
